prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns for a 6-day horizon, assuming ServiceNow (NOW) has moderate volatility around 20-25% annualized. The prediction incorporates mean reversion tendencies with slight upward bias reflecting general market conditions. Confidence intervals widen with higher confidence levels to account for increased uncertainty over the 6-day period, with ranges approximately ±2.4% (50%), ±3.7% (80%), and ±5.1% (90%) from the point estimate.
